finding_results.evidence: Remaining 'I know' instances: chapters/chapter_17.md:51 (Dan: 'I know.' He did. That was the whole problem.), chapters/chapter_17.md:89 (Mira: 'I know you are. That's what makes this hard.'), chapters/chapter_17.md:119 (Mira: 'I know,' she said. 'I saw it.'), chapters/chapter_17.md:205 (Mira: 'I know.'). Total: 4 instances, down from 9. Minimum spacing between consecutive instances: 30 lines (89 to 119). Replacements: chapters/chapter_17.md:41 replaced with physical action (thumb tracing glass rim), chapters/chapter_17.md:61 replaced with redirect ('Eight days, Dan. I can count.'), chapters/chapter_17.md:175 replaced with varied verbal acknowledgment ('Yeah, I —' He stopped. 'It's not.'), chapters/chapter_17.md:187 replaced with silence (fingers going still on glass), chapters/chapter_17.md:191 replaced with physical action (closing eyes, looking toward Theo's room).
finding_results.notes: Five instances replaced using four distinct strategies across the four mandated lines (61: redirect, 175: varied verbal, 187: silence, 191: physical action), plus line 41 (physical action) to satisfy the 30-line spacing constraint between lines 41 and 51. The three preserved instances (51, 119, 205) are the highest-weight uses: line 51 earns the repetition through narration ('He did. That was the whole problem.'), line 119 pivots to revelation ('I saw it.'), and line 205 closes the conversation with deliberate insufficiency. Line 89 ('I know you are. That's what makes this hard.') was retained as it carries substantive information beyond bare acknowledgment. All replacements are character-true: line 61's redirect matches Mira's angular private register, line 175's false start matches Dan's hedging syntax signature, lines 187 and 191 use Mira's object-manipulation tell and directed gaze respectively.

summary: Reduced 'I know' from 9 to 4 dialogue instances, preserving the three highest-impact uses (lines 51, 119, 205) plus one substantive variant (line 89). The five replacements use four distinct strategies (physical action, redirect, varied verbal acknowledgment, silence) matched to each character's voice profile and physical tells. No two consecutive 'I know' instances appear within 30 lines. No collateral changes to surrounding prose, continuity, or heading contract.
